/nix/store/3awwcrqv9lpcq553zs2zb7y0mr5niswd-clang-wrapper-19.1.7/bin/clang++ -fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping -g -fprofile-instr-generate -fsanitize=address -fsanitize=undefined -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_array.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_array.dir/tests/test_array.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_array.dir/cxb/cxb.cpp.o -o test_array  deps/Catch2/src/libCatch2Maind.a deps/Catch2/src/libCatch2d.a
